# terrible_community_sap_libs_sap_company (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `company_id` (String) The company id.
- `conn_password` (String) The required password for the SAP system.
- `conn_username` (String) The required username for the SAP system.
- `host` (String) The required host for the SAP system. Can be either an FQDN or IP Address.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `city` (String) The city where the company is located.
- `client` (String) The client number to connect to. You must quote the value to ensure retaining the leading zeros.
- `country` (String) The country code for the company. For example, `'DE'`.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `e_mail` (String) General E-Mail address.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `name` (String) The company name.
- `name_2` (String) Additional company name.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `post_code` (String) The post code from the city.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) The decision what to do with the company.
- `street` (String) Street where the company is located.
- `street_no` (String) Street number.
- `sysnr` (String) The system number of the SAP system. You must quote the value to ensure retaining the leading zeros.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `time_zone` (String) The timezone.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `msg` (String) A small execution description.
- `out` (String) A complete description of the executed tasks. If this is available.
